name: EMERGE
short_description: Uncover a beautiful story through a different kind of jigsaw puzzle where you piece together Maya's lost memories. Watch as her empty room transforms into a cosy, meaningful space filled with treasured keepsakes as you uncover her beautiful life.
detailed_description:
One night when you can't sleep, a dream spirit visits you, and offers to help you remember your beautiful life.

  • Mystery & Intrigue: Discover Maya's story, by piecing together her memories.

  • Flowing & relaxing: reimagination of jigsaw puzzle that feels flowing and wholesome.

  • Build Maya's Room: Transform Maya's room by unlocking keepsakes as you play.

  • Created by a BAFTA Nominated filmmaker.

PIECE TOGETHER MAYA'S MEMORIES

A reimagination of jigsaw puzzles where you piece together Maya's story through her lost memories. Lose yourself in layered, flowing, and wholesome gameplay that transforms as you play.

TRANSFORM HER ROOM WITH HER KEEPSAKES

Collect memory shards and use it to transform Maya's room into a cosy space that reflects her beautiful full life. Help Maya discover that her life was never truly empty, but vibrant with meaning.

DISCOVER A STORY OF MYSTERY AND INTRIGUE

Piece together over 17 chapter of her life, discover her beautiful story. Discover a secret about her life that is filled with mystery and intrigue.

STORY

  • Each puzzle is a memory of Maya that you piece together to discover her story.

  • A story about belonging, love, loss and meaning.

  • A game that explores the effects of mental degeneration.

From the Dev

Emerge is a game I created during a deeply personal experience caring for my grandmother during her neurodegenerative decline. This game is an exploration of the nature of memories, and what it means to lose them.  I'm a solo dev from Edinburgh, Scotland. I hope you enjoy Emerge.

AI Notice

This game does not use any generative AI content.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
